name: White Stingray
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白棘鱏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホワイト・スティングレイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 WATER monster. You can only Special Summon "White Stingray" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn. You can only use this effect of "White Stingray" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 WATER monster. You can only Special Summon "White Stingray" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn. You can only use this effect of "White Stingray" once per turn.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 WATER monster. You can only Special Summon "White Stingray" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn. You can only use this effect of "White Stingray" once per turn.

stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
